system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan_update","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_GOVAN_Update] (
   @masp              NVARCHAR (MAX),
   @mact              NVARCHAR (20),
   @stt               NVARCHAR (20),
   @chitiet           NVARCHAR (MAX),
   @nguyenlieu        NVARCHAR (MAX),
   @dayy_tc           DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @rong_tc           DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @dai_tc            DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @soluong_tc        INT= 0,
   @m3_tc             DECIMAL (18, 5)= 0,
   @dayy_sc           DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @rong_sc           DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @dai_sc            DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @m3_sc             DECIMAL (18, 5)= 0,
   @dayy_phoi         DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @ghichu            NVARCHAR (MAX),
   @nguoisua          NVARCHAR (20),
   @hinhanh           IMAGE= NULL,
   @soluong_mong      INT= 0,
   @kichthuoc_mong    DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @mong1             DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @mong2             DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @veneer_matchinh   NVARCHAR (200)= NULL,
   @veneer_matphu     NVARCHAR (200)= NULL,
   @veneer_canhngan   INT= 0,
   @veneer_canhdai    INT= 0,
   @chatluong         NVARCHAR (100)= NULL,
   @long              NVARCHAR (100)= NULL,
   @bemat             NVARCHAR (MAX)= NULL,
   @chitiet_ghep      NVARCHAR (200)= NULL,
   @phoi_ghep         DECIMAL (18, 2)= 0,
   @t_sort            INT= 0)
AS
BEGIN
   DECLARE @NHOM   NVARCHAR (50);
   SELECT TOP 1 @NHOM = nhom
   FROM tr_nhom_nguyenlieu
   WHERE nguyenlieu = @nguyenlieu

   DECLARE @soluong_sc   FLOAT
   SET @soluong_sc = @soluong_tc

   IF @NHOM = 'VAN'
      BEGIN
         SET @rong_sc = @rong_tc
         SET @dai_sc = @dai_tc
         SET @dayy_sc = @dayy_tc

         SET @m3_sc =
                (@dayy_sc * @rong_sc * @dai_sc * @soluong_tc) / 1000000000
      END
   ELSE
      IF @NHOM = 'GO'
         BEGIN
            IF @nguyenlieu <> ''
               BEGIN
                  IF @nguyenlieu <> '0'
                     BEGIN

                        SET @dayy_sc = @dayy_tc + 1

                        IF @rong_tc < 61
                           SET @rong_sc = @rong_tc + 1
                        ELSE
                           SET @rong_sc = 61

                        SET @dai_sc = @dai_tc + 20
                        SET @soluong_sc = 0

                        IF @rong_tc > 60
                           SET @soluong_sc =
                                  CEILING
                                  (((@rong_tc + 3) * @soluong_tc) / 61)
                        ELSE
                           SET @soluong_sc = @soluong_tc

                        SET @m3_sc =
                                 (@dayy_sc * @rong_sc * @dai_sc * @soluong_sc)
                               / 1000000000
                     END
                  ELSE
                     BEGIN
                        SET @m3_sc = 0
                        SET @dayy_sc = 0
                        SET @rong_sc = 0
                        SET @dai_tc = 0
                        SET @soluong_sc = 0
                     END
               END
            ELSE
               BEGIN
                  SET @m3_sc = 0
                  SET @dayy_sc = 0
                  SET @rong_sc = 0
                  SET @dai_tc = 0
                  SET @soluong_sc = 0
               END
         END

   DECLARE @INDEX   INT
   SELECT @INDEX = CHARINDEX (N'cong', @ghichu)

   IF LEN (@long) <= 0 AND @INDEX > 0
      SET @long = N'Lọng'

   DECLARE @IsGhep   BIT
   SET @IsGhep = 0

   IF CHARINDEX ('THONG', @nguyenlieu) > 0 AND @rong_tc > 61
      SET @IsGhep = 1

   IF CHARINDEX ('TRAM', @nguyenlieu) > 0 AND @rong_tc > 61
      SET @IsGhep = 1

   IF CHARINDEX ('DE GAI', @nguyenlieu) > 0 AND @rong_tc > 201
      SET @IsGhep = 1

   UPDATE tr_dinhmuc_govan
   SET stt = @stt,
       chitiet = @chitiet,
       nguyenlieu = @nguyenlieu,
       dayy_tc = @dayy_tc,
       rong_tc = @rong_tc,
       dai_tc = @dai_tc,
       soluong_tc = @soluong_tc,
       m3_tc = (@dayy_tc * @rong_tc * @dai_tc * @soluong_tc) / 1000000000,
       dayy_sc = @dayy_sc,
       rong_sc = @rong_sc,
       dai_sc = @dai_sc,
       soluong_sc = @soluong_sc,
       m3_sc = (@dayy_sc * @rong_sc * @dai_sc * @soluong_sc) / 1000000000,
       dayy_phoi = @dayy_phoi,
       ghichu = @ghichu,
       nguoisua = @nguoisua,
       ngaysua = GETDATE (),
       hinhanh = @hinhanh,
       soluong_mong = @soluong_mong,
       kichthuoc_mong = @kichthuoc_mong,
       mong1 = @mong1,
       mong2 = @mong2,
       veneer_matchinh = @veneer_matchinh,
       veneer_matphu = @veneer_matphu,
       veneer_canhngan = @veneer_canhngan,
       veneer_canhdai = @veneer_canhdai,
       chatluong = @chatluong,
       long = @long,
       bemat = @bemat,
       chitiet_ghep = @chitiet_ghep,
       phoi_ghep = @phoi_ghep,
       chitiet_ghep2 = @IsGhep,
       t_sort = @t_sort
   WHERE masp = @masp AND mact = @mact
END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.tr_nhom_nguyenlieu"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan"],"flags":[],"suggestedTier":"B"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
